name: Power of the Golf Ball - Northfield
about: Power of the Golf Ball - Northfield is an indoor golf performance center utilizing Golfzon simulators for year-round practice and play. The facility offers a 1,500 square-foot short game area and adjustable plate technology to simulate real golf lies. It provides programs for all skill levels, including junior leagues, corporate wellness events, and high school/college development, alongside memberships that include unlimited simulator access. Pricing includes monthly and annual options, with a $25 setup fee for OpenPath integration.
why_golfers_like_it: Golfzon simulators are ranked 'Best Simulator' by Golf Digest for 5 consecutive years
Measurable feedback technology with precision and reliability for practice improvement
Ability to play world-class courses like Pebble Beach indoors with HD visuals
Year-round access regardless of weather conditions
Short game improvement area with 1,500 square feet of dedicated space

simulator_hardware.notes: Six Golfzon simulators featured in Wall Street Journal

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs to use with the Golfzon simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are permitted at the facility.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes typically takes 1.5 to 2 hours depending on simulator availability and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Power of the Golf Ball offers junior golf leagues and programs for young golfers.
